name: Creamy Cucumber Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth and creamy.
3. Transfer dressing to an airtight container and store in the refrigerator.
4. Use generously with falafel or fresh green salads.
Serving size: 1/4 cup
Calories: 19.4
Fat: .081 grams
Cholesterol: 3.004 mg
Sodium: 145 mg
